The Secret of Monkey Island
Dial-a-Pirate
Copy Protection  ·  Birth Year Lookup
OUTER RING — TOP HALF
INNER ZONE — BOTTOM HALF

Drag the outer ring to align the Top Half — drag the inner zone to align the Bottom Half. Then pick the island.
Formula: col = Top# − Bottom# (add 14 if negative).

▲ TOP HALF — outer ring
▼ BOTTOM HALF — inner zone
ISLAND:
BIRTH YEAR
← Align both dial halves and select island
☠ Full Reference Table ☠
Example 1: Skull(11) − Dagger(10) = 1 → Tortuga col.1 = 1653
Example 2: Dark Lady(2) − Skull(11) = −9+14 = 5 → Jamaica col.5 = 1628
